Legion Breacher Squad.name: Legion Breacher Squad
Legion Breacher Squad.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Boarding shield; Boltgun; Bolt pistol; Frag grenades; Krak grenades.

option_groups.header: If the squad is part of a Space Marine army, all models in the unit must receive the "They Shall Know No Fear" ability (points per model): +1 point.
If the squad is part of a Chaos Space Marine army, all models in the unit may receive a Mark of Chaos (points per model)
For every 5 models, two Legionaries may swap their Bolt gun

abilities: Boarding shield: The model gains the "Deflect", "Parry" and "Unyielding" abilities. All melee weapons carried by the model gain the "Unwieldy" ability. Additionally, the model always benefits from the "Hold Your Ground" effect.

Legion Tactical Squad.name: Legion Tactical Squad
Legion Tactical Squad.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Boltgun; Bolt pistol; Frag grenades; Krak grenades.

option_groups.header: If the squad is part of a Space Marine army, all models in the unit must receive the "They Shall Know No Fear" ability (points per model): +1 point.
If the squad is part of a Chaos Space Marine army, all models in the unit may receive a Mark of Chaos (points per model)
Any model armed with a Bolt gun may be equipped with one of the following
All Legionary models in the unit may be equipped with an Astartes chainsword for +5 points each.

abilities: Heart of the Legion: The unit gains a 5+ invulnerability saving throw while within 6" of a mission objective.
Wrath of the Legion: All weapons in the unit have the "Deflagrate(5+)" ability.

Kharybdis Assault Claw.name: Kharybdis Assault Claw
Kharybdis Assault Claw.equipped_with: A Kharybdis Assault Claw is equipped with: 5 Kharybdis storm launchers; Melta-ram.

option_groups.header: If the model is part of a Chaos Space Marine army, it may receive a Mark of Chaos

abilities: Assault ramp: Passengers can still make a 6" charge move after the vehicle moves and they exit.

Control Jets: The unit must land at least 6" away from other units (friendly or enemy) and can never stray closer than 1" to another unit, terrain, or the edge of the field. Reduce the deviation only enough to place the model.
Drop Pod Assault: Kharybdis Assault Claws always start the game as reserves and are always set up via Deep Strike. Even if the played mission does not allow reinforcements and/or Deep Strike!
Melta-ram: Attacks with the Melta-ram hit automatically.
Transport: This model has a transport capacity of 20 infantry models or 2 Dreadnoughts.

Legion Sicaran Battle Tank.name: Legion Sicaran Battle Tank
Legion Sicaran Battle Tank.equipped_with: A Sicaran Battle Tank is equipped with: Heracles autocannon.

option_groups.header: If the model is part of a Chaos Space Marine army, it may receive a Mark of Chaos
May be equipped with one of the following
Can be equipped with a Storm bolter for +11 points.

equipment.name: Augury scanner
equipment.desc: Enemy units may not be set up as Infiltrators within 18" of this model, even if they are not visible.

equipment.name: Breacher shield
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Deflect", "Parry" and "Unyielding" abilities. All melee weapons carried by the model gain the "Unwieldy" ability. Additionally, the model always benefits from the "Hold Your Ground" effect.

equipment.name: Cataphractii armor
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Toughness, +1 Attack, a 2+ armor save, a 4+ invulnerable save and the abilities "Deep strike", "Massive(1)" and "Unyielding". Only for infantry.

equipment.name: Crusade weapon
equipment.desc:
One melee weapon of the model gains one of the following:
- Chain: The weapon gains the "Shred" ability.
- Charnabal: The weapon gains the "Quick(+1)" ability.
- Nocturne masterwork: The weapon may re-roll all to hit rolls.
- Phoenix: The weapon gains the "Armor piercing(5+)" ability.
- Solarite: The weapon's Strength value is set to x3. Only for weapons that have a x2 for their Strength value.
Every enhancement in the army must be the same. Can not be combined with any other equipment apart from "Master-crafted weapon".

equipment.name: Grenade harness
equipment.desc: The model may always throw a Grenade in addition to its ranged weapons, or throw two Grenades instead of one.

equipment.name: Legion Scimitar Jetbike (Heavy bolter)
equipment.desc: The model gains +6" movement, +1 Toughness, +1 Wound, a Heavy bolter and the "Jet Bike" type. Only for infantry.

equipment.name: Legion vexilla
equipment.desc: The unit gains +1 to their combat resolution in melee.

equipment.name: Nuncio-vox
equipment.desc: If a friendly unit arrives on the table via Deep strike, reduce the amount of dice rolled for scatter by 1 (to a minimum of 1D6). The model carrying the Nuncio-vox must have a line of sight to the friendly unit that arrives to use the effect.
